heading: Short title of amendment of 1942
label: 1701b Short title of amendment of 1942
text: The , , may be cited as the “National Housing Act Amendments of 1942”.Act of May 26, 1942, ch. 31956 Stat. 301
notes: References in TextThe National Housing Act Amendments of 1942, referred to in text, enacted , amended heading of subchapter VI of this chapter [preceding ], amended sections 1703, 1715c, 1737, 1738, 1739, and 1740 of this title, and enacted provisions set out as a note under .section 1743 of this titlesection 1736 of this titlesection 1743 of this title
CodificationSection was enacted as part of the National Housing Act Amendments of 1942, and not as part of the National Housing Act which comprises this chapter.
